channel.title: Tech on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tech on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Luddite Festival Challenges Tech
item.description:
Introduction to the Luddite Movement  

The Summer of Ludd, a Luddite festival, took place in New York earlier this month, promoting a movement against technology’s negative impact on society. This movement is not just about moving away from Big Tech tools but also about creating alternative infrastructure and technology that serves people. The festival included workshops, events, and activities to encourage people to engage with the world in a more meaningful way. As Valve’s Steam Machine and other tech advancements continue to shape our world, it’s essential to consider the potential downsides of technology.

item.title: Prime Day Deals Under $30
item.description:
Introduction to Prime Day Deals  

In today’s economy, it’s essential to make the most of your budget. With the rise of “Buy Now, Pay Later” services and increasing inflation, finding affordable deals on everyday products is crucial. Amazon Prime Day is an excellent opportunity to snag discounts on a wide range of products, including tech, home, and outdoor gear. In this article, we’ll explore the best Amazon Prime Day deals under $30, featuring products that have been tested and approved by WIRED.

item.title: Prime Day Apple Deals
item.description:
Introduction to Prime Day Apple Deals  

Prime Day is one of the most anticipated shopping events of the year, offering exclusive deals and discounts on a wide range of products, including Apple devices. If you’re in the market for a new pair of wireless earbuds, a smartwatch, or any other Apple product, Prime Day is an excellent opportunity to snag a great deal. In this article, we’ll delve into the best Apple deals available during Prime Day, highlighting the discounts, features, and benefits of each product.
